summary: The Docker build failed because a wget command to download a nydus release returned an HTTP 502 error, causing buildx bake to fail during the solve phase.
root_cause: A network/media fetch failed: wget to GitHub returned "HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error" and the wget process exited with code 1, which caused buildx bake to fail.

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Shows the download command hit a 502 Bad Gateway error from the remote server.

evidence.quote: #72 ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Shows the wget command exited with a non-zero status, failing the build step that runs it.

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Indicates the buildkit solve step failed because the wget process failed.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: CI job reports buildx bake failure tied to the failing wget command.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:11Z" level=debug msg="fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Get \"https://cdn01.quay.io/quayio-production-s3/...\": context canceled"
evidence.reason: Additional fetch failures and 'context canceled' errors show network/request problems during image layer downloads.

evidence.quote: Failed to save: Unable to reserve cache with key docker.io--tonistiigi--binfmt-latest-linux-x64, another job may be creating this cache.
evidence.reason: A cache reservation conflict appeared at the end, suggesting concurrent jobs or transient resource contention in the CI environment.

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job (network/remote-service transient failure). If failures persist, verify the URL https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/... is reachable from the runner, add retries or fallback/mirroring for the wget download in the Dockerfile, or vendor the required nydus artifact into the build context to avoid external fetches.
